2190480.name: Eat Your Fucking Soup
2190480.description:
Eat Your Fucking Soup is a comedy horror game developed by Aaron Wise & Vidas Games. The idea came about for our love of memes & shit posting, but also our love of horror. Known only to a select few, we started working on an idea that we hoped would resonate with players & bring a fresh taste to comedy & horror. Very rarely do you see these two genres get mixed together. With Aaron's iconic low poly style & Vidas's brilliant monster design & music, we set out to create something that everyone can enjoy.

Eat Your Fucking Soup is a new entry for us, & we hope you will laugh, cry & get frightened when playing.





Ben Dover's soup company is releasing a new soup at just 10 cents a can! Unbelievable value! With the economy in crisis, the new Soup offering has millions queuing around the block to fill up on cheap & tasty food. But what's this shit we are hearing on the news about a potentially fatal new food sweeping the nation?
The whistleblower claims to know all & is ready to spill the beans.... uhhh Soup.

You play a nameless individual as you spend most of your days locked inside your house, protected from the events of the outside world. People are going crazy, human decency is at an all-time low & social media is rampant with soup-brained individuals.

As each day passes, strange things start to happen that result in hallucinations, mind-bending imagery & nightmares. Suddenly, your home no longer feels like home. What once was a safe haven from the outside world, quickly becomes a prison that you must escape. But it's gonna take a lot of soup, guts & gore to make it out alive!





- Fast-paced FPS Action
- Comedy Horror Story that will have you laughing
- Genuine spooks that will creep you out
- Monster Design by Vidas Salavejus
- More interactions that you can shake a stick at
- 3 Built-in GameBoi Games
- Full Voice Acting
- Saving & Loading
- Draw whatever you want on the whiteboards!





WASD - MOVE
E - INTERACT
MOUSE - LOOK
1 KEY - CROWBAR
2 KEY - EQUIP PISTOL
3 KEY - EQUIP SHOTGUN
4 KEY - GAMEBOY
5 KEY - EQUIP MINIGUN
ENTER - USE GAMEBOY WHEN EQUIPPED
F - FLASHLIGHT
MIDDLE MOUSE (HELD) - DRAW ON THE WHITEBOARD
LEFT MOUSE - AIM WEAPON
RIGHT MOUSE - SHOOT
R KEY - RELOAD
2190480.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
